landing.heroSubtitle: From zero to fluent. Vocairo adapts to your level in real-time, tracks every mistake, and builds a personalized path to fluency.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to learn a language. Nothing you don't.
landing.featureInstantLevelDesc: Start a conversation and Vocairo maps your level within minutes. No tedious placement tests.
landing.featureAdaptivePathDesc: AI builds a unique curriculum based on your strengths, weaknesses, and learning speed.
landing.featureAnalyticsDesc: Track vocabulary growth, grammar accuracy, and common mistakes with detailed breakdowns.
landing.featureInteractiveDesc: Learn through real conversations with AI that corrects, explains, and adapts in context.
landing.featureGrammarRefDesc: Structured pages for every grammar rule, linked to your practice. Always one tap away.
landing.featureSmartRepDesc: Spaced repetition powered by your real error patterns, not generic algorithms.
landing.howItWorksTitle: From zero to fluent in four steps
landing.stepQuickScanDesc: Vocairo analyzes your responses in real-time to determine your exact level — vocabulary range, grammar accuracy, and comprehension depth.
landing.stepPersonalPathDesc: Based on your level, the AI builds a structured curriculum focusing on practical vocabulary, essential grammar, and real-world usage patterns.
landing.stepPracticeDesc: Chat with AI, complete exercises, and get instant corrections with clear explanations. Every mistake becomes a learning opportunity tracked in your profile.
landing.stepReviewDesc: Access your grammar reference, vocabulary list, and error patterns anytime. Watch your level grow as the system continuously adapts to your progress.
landing.interactiveChatTitle: Learn by doing. Get corrected instantly.
landing.interactiveChatDesc: Practice in a natural conversation. Vocairo catches your mistakes, explains the rules, and adapts the difficulty based on your performance — all in real-time.
landing.chatPrompt: Let's practice past tenses. Tell me about something interesting you did last weekend.
landing.chatUserMsg: I go to the museum and seen a very beautiful exhibition about modern art.
landing.chatFollowUp: Good effort! You used great vocabulary. Let's focus on irregular past tense forms — try another sentence.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Free to start. No credit card required.
landing.waitlistSuccess: You're on the list! We'll notify you when we launch.
landing.waitlistAlready: You're already on the list! We'll be in touch soon.
landing.waitlistError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
landing.waitlistCtaTitle: Be the first to try Vocairo
landing.waitlistCtaSubtitle: Join our waitlist and get early access when we launch.

cookies.message: We use cookies to analyze site usage and improve your experience.

footer.tagline: Your Language, Accelerated. AI-powered adaptive learning that tracks your progress and builds a personalized path to fluency.

welcome.description: Practice English with your personal AI tutor. Get real-time corrections, vocabulary suggestions, and adaptive exercises tailored to your level.
welcome.modeAdaptiveDesc: AI adjusts difficulty to your level in real time
welcome.modeFreeTalkDesc: Open conversation on any topic you choose
welcome.modeGrammarDesc: Targeted practice on specific grammar points
welcome.stepChatDesc: Write in English on any topic. The AI responds naturally.
welcome.stepCorrectDesc: Get real-time grammar and vocabulary corrections inline.
welcome.stepQuizDesc: The AI sends mini-quizzes based on your weak areas.
welcome.stepTrackDesc: See your accuracy, streaks, and vocabulary growth over time.
welcome.proTipText: Don't worry about mistakes — they're your best learning tool! The AI tracks your error patterns and creates targeted practice. The more you write, the faster you improve.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple pricing for serious learners
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.
pricing.freeDescription: Everything you need to start learning
pricing.compareTitle: Free vs Pro — side by side
pricing.faq1Q: Can I use Vocairo for free?
pricing.faq1A: Yes! The free plan gives you 3 training sessions per day, 5 AI Tutor messages, and access to beginner-intermediate grammar levels. It's enough to build a daily learning habit.
pricing.faq2Q: What happens when I upgrade to Pro?
pricing.faq2A: You immediately get unlimited training sessions, unlimited AI Tutor messages, all grammar levels (A1–C2), all 20+ exercise types, and detailed analytics. Your existing progress is preserved.
pricing.faq3A: Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your profile settings. You'll keep Pro access until the end of your current billing period.
pricing.faq4A: Yes! The annual plan saves you 37% compared to monthly billing — just $59.99/year instead of $95.88/year.
pricing.ctaSubtitle: Start for free. No credit card required.

onboarding.levelA1: You're just getting started. Perfect — every expert was once a beginner.
onboarding.levelA2: You know the basics. Time to build on that foundation.
onboarding.levelB1: Solid intermediate level. You can handle everyday situations.
onboarding.levelB2: Upper intermediate. You can discuss most topics with confidence.
onboarding.levelC1: Advanced! You express yourself fluently and spontaneously.
